# Data Sources

A Data Source is any external data system that can be connected to Bosler. Examples of a Data Source include, but are not limited to:

- Postgres database
- S3 bucket
- SAP instance
- REST API on the internet

To establish a connection to Bosler, a configured Data Source is required. It is important to note that a Data Source cannot be used directly in Bosler, data must be synchronised into a dataset before it can be utilized.

## Prerequisites

Before configuring a Source, ensure that you have the necessary credentials and access permissions to the data system.

# Supported data sources

:::tip
More coming soon - let us know if there's one you want us to prioritize!
:::

## Steps to setup

This guide will take you through the process of adding a data source. The user must be a platform administrator to import a data source. To import it:

- Log in to your account
- Go to Data Connection using the sidebar menu

![CreateNewSource](../_media/docs_ss/Ingestion/datasources/CreateNewSource.PNG)

- Go to + New
- Under the source tab, select the option for "Source" in the top-right corner

![DatasetSource](../_media/docs_ss/Ingestion/datasources/DatasetSource.PNG)

- Enter name for the Source with Connector Details for desired connector and previously created Agent plus parent folder
- Click Create
